Video.summary: The team from Wired2Fish delivers the goods on how to catch the biggest fish—wherever or whenever you're casting lines.
Video.grandparentTitle: Wired2Fish | Baits and Gear For the Biggest Catch
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: The Lindner team takes viewers to the best locations for the biggest fish.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Angling legend Jimmy Houston takes us on his most successful trips with big fish and hilarious antics.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Join the FishON! TV crew as we tackle rugged Northern Ontario terrain with our Polaris Ranger equipped with a custom boat rack. This remote expedition takes us deep into the wilderness to an untouched lake known for its walleye bounty. From the adrenaline of the journey to the thrill of the catch, this episode is packed with adventure, stunning scenery, and fishing tips you won’t want to miss!
Video.grandparentTitle: FishON! | Trailblazing to Trophy Walleye: Polaris Ranger Adventure
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Fishing legend Hank Parker take viewers to the most secluded locations for the biggest fish.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Learn the best gear and strategies to target the biggest fish in the pre-spawn spring angling season.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Jim and Capt Chris Adams, sight fish for Redfish at Mosquito Lagoon on the east coast of Florida.
Video.grandparentTitle: Jim Crowley Outdoors | Redfish at Mosquito Lagoon
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: At Venice, Louisiana, Shaw fishes with renowned captain Mike Frenette for trophy redfish.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: As fall grips Northern Ontario, unpredictable weather makes fishing a true test of patience and perseverance. Paul is joined by young angler Matthew, who’s finishing university and weighing the decision to stay in the North. Facing extreme cold on their first attempt, the duo regroup and return a few days later to a new lake, chasing walleye and capturing the stunning wilderness that makes Northern Ontario a fall angler’s paradise.
Video.grandparentTitle: Remote Lakes, Big Fish, Epic Days
Video.title: FishON | Fall Walleye Challenge

Video.summary: Remote Northern Wilderness, Smallmouth Bass Fishing part 3
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Redfish Lodge
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: In the first season of Operation Fishing Freedom, we shared the story of a 37 month POW, Darrell Krenz. Now, we fly him to Texas to reconnect Darrell with Veteran Jack Goodwin. After the emotional surprise meeting, they reconnect and discuss their time alongside each other as 37 month POWs during the Korean War.
Video.grandparentTitle: Operation Fishing Freedom - Korean War POW Jack Goodwin
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Putting Okumas new Serrano Series Bass Rods to the test, Shea McIntee heads out with a good friend and local guide, Todd Kline, for an epic day of early winter Bass fishing.
Video.grandparentTitle: Stoked on Fishing - Winter Bass Fishing at Lake Perris
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Brent Chapmans Pro vs Joe- Heads up at Live Oak
Video.grandparentTitle: Pro vs Joe - Heads up at Live Oak
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Join us as we travel to Ole's Adventure Lodge on the picturesque Whitefish Lake, just west of Thunder Bay, Ontario. In this special episode, we shine a spotlight on the Experience Fishing program, dedicated to introducing the joys of angling to children, new Canadians, and women. Witness the excitement of first-time fishing adventures in a breathtaking setting that inspires connection with nature and community.
Video.grandparentTitle: FishON! | Experience Fishing at Ole's Adventure Lodge
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Tennessee River fishing guide and bass tournament record holder, Rogne Brown joins host, Kim Stricker to share grass fishing tips and his developed sense of awareness while on the water. Strike King’s Sexy Dawg walking bait is the featured presentation.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Redemption on Horwood Lake with our local friends. Chasing Walleye in Northern Ontario.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Brent Chapmans Pro vs Joe College Classic Champ
Video.grandparentTitle: Pro vs Joe - College Classic Champ
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Some of the most incredible parts of fishing includes traveling to new destinations, making new friends, and catching new fish. Shea McIntee and the crew travel north to Santa Barbra and jump on board the 58-foot charter boat, the Coral Sea. We get extra lucky because mother nature allows us to travel up the coastline into a territory that most people don't get the opportunity to fish.
Video.grandparentTitle: Stoked on Fishing - Full Speed Rock Fishing on the Coral Sea
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Jeremy Smith and St. Croix Rod's Rich Belanger chase an epic walleye, pike, and muskie bite out of Ontario's Moosehorn Lodge.
Video.grandparentTitle: Lindner's Angling - The Legendary Lac Seul
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: We said it last year, and we're going to repeat it this year; Alaska is something special. There's so much nature and beauty here. It's unbelievable. Last week Shea McIntee and the crew had excellent Halibut and Black Bass fishing. This week, mother nature gave us the perfect weather for salmon fishing, and we had a blast. Stoked on Alaska. Here we go!
Video.title: Stoked on Fishing — Back to Gustavus Alaska, Pt. 3

Image.alt: Stoked on Fishing — Back to Gustavus Alaska, Pt. 3
Stoked on Fishing — Back to Gustavus Alaska, Pt. 3
Stoked on Fishing — Back to Gustavus Alaska, Pt. 3

Video.summary: Lake Winnebago has finally frozen, and perch fishing is good! This week, we're in our backyard doing sight fishing with lightning lance! We'll also show off how our guiding business works, so hang onto your hineys!
Video.title: Larry Smith Outdoors | Sight Fishing Perch

Image.alt: Larry Smith Outdoors | Sight Fishing Perch
Larry Smith Outdoors | Sight Fishing Perch
Larry Smith Outdoors | Sight Fishing Perch

Video.summary: Larry takes us on the clear waters of Lake Michigan for some amazing salmon fishing.
Video.title: Charter Boating Milwaukee

Video.summary: This episode is all about Swimbaits, perhaps the most versatile tool in the tackle box for catching just about everything that swims.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Jim shows you, in detail how to build your own Ned Rig rod.
Video.grandparentTitle: Angler's Workshop | Building A Ned Rig Rod
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Dusitn takes on classic Fall conditions explaining the best ways to approach bass throughout the day.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Jim shows you how to build a hair jig rod, with detailed instruction from one of his Signature Series rod kits.
Video.grandparentTitle: Angler's Workshop | The Perfect Hair Jig Rod
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Join Stoked On Fishing as we embark on a thrilling 6-day fishing expedition to the enchanted Island of Puerto Rico. Nestled along the west coast, we'll be based in the charming fishing town of La Pargueta and fishing along the west coast locations of Cabo Rojo and Rincon. Get ready for an unforgettable adventure filled with wide-open offshore and inshore fishing. Stoked On Puerto Rico
Video.grandparentTitle: Stoked on Fishing | A Fisherman's Paradise: Stoked on Puerto Rico
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Fishing can be very high-tech, but on the other end of the spectrum, it can actually be very simple. Today we're going to show you some presentations and tactics to put fish in the boat....easily!
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: A few years back, we rallied up with my buddy Chris Atkins who owns and operates Central America fishing. He told me, Shea, you have to do a Stoked On Fishing Charters Panama trip and fish at Coiba National Park. It's the largest island in Central America, next to the world-famous Hannibal Bank. Needless to say, we rallied up the troops and made our way down south; it's only six hours from LAX our first Adventure was incredible, and that's precisely why we're returning for our second time.
Video.grandparentTitle: Stoked on Fishing | Stoked on Coiba National Park, Panama: Part Four
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: On today's episode of AnglingBuzz TV, we're talking all about finding walleye and how to catch them! Our special guest is Jason Freed who's a fishing guide on Minnesota's famous Leech Lake.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Jim talks with professional guide and tournament angler Spencer Clark.
Video.title: Episode 1
